Dialogue:
You'll sssee no gold
until we ssseal the
pact in blood, ratman.

You'll see no gold
until we seal the
pact in blood, ratman.

Two score blood
sssausages. Raw.

Two score blood
sausages. Raw.
Neeeigh!
<nicker>
“Fair fortune”! Not bad!
It will be a wonderful year, I'm sure of it.
Behold the majesty of the horse!
A truly magnificent beast...
We shall master these steeds, yes, yes!
Do not do anything foolish, now!
The year of the unicorn, is it?
<Emphasis>Horse</Emphasis>, my lord. 'Tis the year of the horse.
Ahhh, so blessedly warm…
Ahhh, so blessedly warm...
Can I tempt you with another?
Oh, you do spoil me...!
I should take a slice for Kupka Kupp...but which one?
Kweh, kweh!♪
What a handsomely decorated cake, kupo!
I understand this need for cake on a deep and spiritual level...
Now this is an intriguin' recipe...
Aren't you having any?
What need have I of cake, when I have your sweet love?
It would be lovely to share a cake like this with everyone in Werlyt...
I'll see to procuring some baking equipment.
Then I'll wipe your tears─you needn't wolf it down so!
It's so good I could cry...!
Well, if this ain't proper bene!
So this is the height of Gridanian sophistication...!
